description_long: This is a small, rectangular bakery building with a flat roof bordered by a raised orange parapet. The front facade features a central glass door flanked by two large blue-tinted windows, each topped with a striped orange-and-white awning. Two potted plants are symmetrically placed at the entrance, adding a welcoming touch. The side walls each have a single large window, also covered by matching striped awnings. The roof includes a small, boxy HVAC or vent unit, and the building's exterior is finished in a light beige color with orange trim. The overall design is simple and modern, with playful, inviting colors and minimal ornamentation.
description: A small, modern bakery building with orange-and-white striped awnings, blue windows, and a flat roof. The facade features a central door, large display windows, and potted plants at the entrance.
description_view_0: The rear of the bakery, showing a plain beige wall with an orange roof border and a small rooftop vent visible.
description_view_1: A side view displaying a large blue window with an orange-and-white striped awning and a glimpse of a potted plant near the front.
description_view_2: The front view, featuring the main entrance with a glass door, two large blue windows with striped awnings, and two potted plants.
description_view_3: The opposite side view, mirroring the other side with a large window and striped awning, and the rooftop vent more clearly visible.
attribute_awning_with_bakery_branding: There are orange-and-white striped fabric awnings above the windows and door on the front and sides of the building. The awnings are rectangular and extend outward, but there is no visible bakery branding, logos, or text.
attribute_architectural_style: The building features a simple, modern architectural style with clean lines, flat roof, and playful color accents. The use of striped awnings and potted plants adds a welcoming, contemporary touch.
